hero.subtitle: Your disinfection fails because the problem is the sequence and method. Rediscover hygiene with Les Laboratoires N2K. A rigorous scientific approach for Tunisian livestock farming.
hero.imageAlt: Modern Tunisian poultry house interior, ready for cleaning with natural light

hub.title: The 3 Weak Links of your Profitability
hub.subtitle: Modern livestock farming doesn't tolerate improvisation. Choose the zone you want to secure.

batiment.title: Zone 01: The Building
batiment.description: Eradicate biofilm on walls and equipment.

water.title: Zone 02: Water
water.description: Decontamination of networks and healthy distribution.

batiment.pageSubtitle: Between two cycles: The window of opportunity to break the pathogen cycle.

problem.title: Biofilm — The Invisible Enemy
problem.content: Biofilm is a protective matrix that bacteria create on surfaces. It resists conventional disinfectants and reforms within 48h if the surface isn't treated in depth.
problem.impact: Impact: Up to 8% additional mortality per flock.

step1.name: CLORAGRO
step1.desc: Radical destruction of organic biofilm. Essential preparation before disinfection.

step2.name: OPTIMAGRO
step2.desc: Full spectrum disinfection (Bactericidal, Virucidal, Fungicidal). Maximum persistence.

water.pageSubtitle: Drinking network: The largest vector of contamination.

problem.title: Pipes — The Silent Vector
problem.content: The water reaching your drinkers travels through kilometers of piping where limescale and organic residues create ideal conditions for pathogens.
problem.impact: Impact: Up to +15% on the feed conversion ratio (FCR).

step1.name: BIONET
step1.desc: Technical cleaning of pipes. Stripping of organic and limescale deposits.

step2.name: AQUACONTROL N2K
step2.desc: Water quality stabilization. Constant control of microbial load.

air.pageSubtitle: Aero-biocontamination: When air becomes a threat.

problem.title: Respiratory Pressure — The Forgotten Factor
problem.content: Ammonia and airborne microbial load attack the respiratory mucous membranes of animals.
problem.impact: Impact: Up to -12% on Average Daily Gain (ADG).

step1.name: AIRSAN N2K
step1.desc: Reduction of airborne microbial load and harmful gases (Ammonia).

step2.name: BIOACTIVE N2K
step2.desc: Enzymatic degradation of organic matter (grease, proteins, biofilms) for deep cleaning.

problems.title: Your livestock is under
problems.subtitle: Pathogens never sleep. Without a rigorous sequential protocol, your investment is at the mercy of invisible contamination.

building.title: Building & Biofilm
building.description: Porous walls house bacterial colonies that resist conventional washing.

water.title: Water Network
water.description: Limescale and organic deposits in pipes are the #1 vectors of disease.

air.title: Air Quality
air.description: Ammonia and dust saturate your animals' respiratory defenses.

protocol.title: A 2-Phase Sequential Protocol
protocol.subtitle: For total biosecurity, the sequence of actions is more critical than the products themselves.

technicalExcellence.title: Scientific Excellence & Standards
technicalExcellence.subtitle: Our commitment to quality is built on unwavering technical pillars.

rd.title: R&D at Borj Cédria Technopark
rd.content: Our formulations are the result of applied research conducted in collaboration with Tunisian research centers. We test every product on bacterial strains isolated directly from local farms to ensure maximum effectiveness.

compliance.title: Certification & Compliance
compliance.content: All our biocide products comply with Tunisian and international sanitary safety standards. We provide complete Safety Data Sheets (SDS) and usage protocols validated by our scientific management.

support.title: Field Technical Support
support.content: N2K expertise doesn't stop at sales. We support our partners during biosecurity audits and train technical teams in good hygiene practices and sequential disinfection.

solutionsPage.heroTitle: A product's effectiveness doesn't depend on its composition alone,
solutionsPage.heroTitleHighlight: but on its integration into a rigorous protocol.
solutionsPage.heroSubtitle: Developed at the Borj Cédria Technology Park under the direction of Dr Mahmoud Naffeti, our formulations are designed for Tunisian field realities. Each protocol follows a precise sequence: Cleaning → Disinfection or Stabilization.

batiment.title: Surfaces & Floors: Breaking the Pathogen Cycle
batiment.subtitle: Biofilm is a microbial fortress. Disinfection applied directly on biofilm is a wasted investment. Our sequential protocols guarantee a truly sterile surface.

product1.name: CLORAGRO
product1.desc: Ultra-powerful chlorinated alkaline designed to break down the organic matrix of biofilm and eliminate persistent fats in agricultural environments.
features: Elimination of persistent fats and proteins

product2.name: OPTIMAGRO
product2.desc: Stabilized full-spectrum acid. Intervenes on a 'stripped' surface for surgical disinfection of residual pathogens.

batiment.fieldReport: The sequential application of CLORAGRO/OPTIMAGRO reduced microbial load by 99.8% at this pilot site.

eau.title: Drinking Network: The Main Contamination Vector
eau.subtitle: Water is the primary contamination vector in livestock farming. A clean network is the foundation of all zootechnical performance.

product1.name: BIONET
product1.desc: Technical cleaning of pipes. Stripping of organic and limescale deposits.
features: Radical elimination of scale and mineral deposits
Descaling of the most complex pipework
Immediate shock action before animal placement

product2.name: AQUACONTROL N2K
product2.desc: Water quality stabilization. Constant control of microbial load.
features: Full compatibility with automatic dosing systems

ambiance.title: Aero-Biocontamination: When Air Becomes a Threat
ambiance.subtitle: Ammonia and airborne microbial load attack respiratory mucous membranes. Atmosphere control is an often-neglected performance lever.

product1.name: AIRSAN N2K
product1.desc: A fine solution that remains suspended to neutralize airborne pathogens without wetting the litter.

product2.name: BIOACTIVE N2K
product2.desc: Concentrated enzymatic cleaner based on proteases, lipases and amylases. Degrades organic matter to prepare surfaces for disinfection.

ambiance.scienceNote: Atmosphere control reduces respiratory pathologies by 15% in intensive farming.

solutionsPage.authorityQuote: "A product without method is a cost. A product with our protocol is a profitable investment."

about.heroSubtitle: More than just application, we deploy hygiene engineering adapted to the real constraints of industrial and intensive farming environments.
about.specialistDesc1: Les Laboratoires N2K stand at the intersection of scientific research and operational efficiency. Based at the Borj Cédria Technopark, we understand the unique challenges of intensive farming in Tunisia.
about.specialistDesc2: Our mission is to break the cycle of contamination by addressing root causes, especially microbial biofilm, often overlooked by standard solutions.

hygiene.title: Reduce sanitary pressure
hygiene.desc: Drastic elimination of pathogens to limit epidemics in buildings.

safety.title: Ensure a healthy environment
safety.desc: Protection of animal welfare and field operator safety.

optimization.title: Optimize protocols
optimization.desc: Reduction of unnecessary dosages and time savings during sanitary breaks.

performance.title: Improve performance
performance.desc: Direct correlation between controlled hygiene and farm profitability.

cleaning.title: Technical Cleaning
cleaning.desc: Detergence is the foundation. Our formulations target the toughest organic matter to prepare for disinfection.

disinfection.title: Professional Disinfection
disinfection.desc: Broad spectrum: Virucidal, Bactericidal, Fungicidal. Proven efficacy against resistant strains in agricultural settings.

biofilm.title: Biofilm Management
biofilm.desc: Our differentiator. We destroy the protective matrix of bacteria for deep hygiene of porous surfaces.

step1.title: Field Diagnostic
step1.desc: Visual audit and sampling to identify critical contamination points.

step2.title: Product Selection
step2.desc: Choice of active molecules adapted to organic load and building type.

step3.title: Precise Protocols
step3.desc: Writing application technical sheets: dosage, contact time, equipment.

step4.title: Monitoring & Optimization
step4.desc: Post-application efficacy control and continuous process adjustment.

about.resultsDesc: Data collected from our interventions in poultry farming and industrial settings.
about.resultsStat: Average observed after application of the N2K Bio-Shield protocol on porous concrete surfaces infested with salmonella.
about.errorsSubtitle: These common practices drastically reduce the effectiveness of your treatments.

underdosing.title: Systematic under-dosing
underdosing.desc: Believing you save by over-diluting. This promotes microbial resistance and renders treatment ineffective.

noDetergence.title: Neglecting detergence
noDetergence.desc: A disinfectant applied to a dirty surface is instantly neutralized by organic matter.

contactTime.title: Insufficient contact time
contactTime.desc: Rinsing too quickly. Each chemical agent needs 15 to 30 minutes to destroy the cell membrane.

step1.title: Detergence
step1.desc: Application of an alkaline foaming agent. 20 min pause. Grease removal.

step2.title: High Pressure Rinse
step2.desc: Mechanical removal of residues and detergent. The surface must be visually clean.

step3.title: Disinfection
step3.desc: Application by spraying or thermal fogging. Strict compliance with N2K dosage.

about.ctaDesc: Contact our engineers for a complete field audit and a detailed technical proposal.
